_comment: Thresholds for Android Emulator Debug perf guard. Metrics: tokensStartMs (Home:refresh:start:tokens timestamp), tokensSpanMs (done-start), functionCallCount (#lines in function_call.log). Values are absolute; trigger when median > threshold (strategy=median).
_baseline_note: Computed from sample sessions perf-mkmsibyg-ajmw6t / perf-mkmsjcg3-466c61 / perf-mkmske89-t3z39n with +10% tolerance.
